what_is_the_error: Checkout pods are CPU-throttled; latency rises while error rates may still look acceptable until timeouts occur.
likely_cause: Insufficient CPU limits/requests, hot loops introduced in code, noisy neighbor workloads, or traffic shift without autoscaling headroom.
remediation_suggestions: Inspect CPU saturation and throttling metrics per pod.
Raise CPU requests/limits temporarily if clearly capacity-bound.
Profile or diff recent changes for unexpected CPU burn.
Scale out horizontally if the service is horizontally scalable.
triage_summary: Medium/high CPU brownout on checkout-demo: latency creep typical of CPU starvation or inefficient hot paths.
suspected_cause: CPU limits too low for current load or regression increasing CPU per request.
